_description: PI (Primary Identifier) execution analysis payload for sub-audit types — includes PI not-found gaps, found vs not-found summary, reason analysis, and 100% execution sub-audits.

topSubAuditsByPINotFound._description: Top 3 sub-audit types with the highest count of PI Not Found, sorted descending by piNotFoundCount.

piFoundVsNotFoundSummary._description: Aggregate PI found vs not-found statistics across all 5 sub-audit types, with top 3 sub-audits by total PI volume.

piNotFoundReasonAnalysis._description: Not Found reason breakdown for top 5 sub-audits by piNotFoundCount. AI narrator identifies recurring reasons across these sub-audits from topSubAuditsWithReasons[].

fullPIExecutionSubAudits._description: Sub-audits with 100% PI execution (piNotFoundCount = 0). 5 of 5 sub-audits achieved full execution.
